outputs.purpose: Standalone node test harness. Run with: node run-tests.js

Staged copy of the assembled bundle (rules-engine.js, ai-opponent.js, ui-render.js, ui-render.css, controller.js, index.html) used as the test target. Note: the canonical bundle lives in each section's builder output dir; the Integrator should source from those, not from sandbox/.

coverage.ui_render_logical: 5/5 (mount, filled state + disabled, winning line, click guards, restart handler)
coverage.controller_static: 3/3 (composition, defensive guards, no extra DOM ops)

notes: All component-level acceptance criteria from sections-v1.json are exercised. The remaining acceptance item -- 'page works opened directly via file://' -- requires a real browser. Static inspection confirms no external URLs, no build step, and a self-contained <script>+<link> shell, which is necessary and sufficient for file:// loading. The Integrator's smoke run (or the user opening index.html) is the final live confirmation.

Two corrections were made during testing: (1) ai-opponent.js was extended to also resolve RulesEngine via './rules-engine.js' so the staged sandbox bundle works in node tests as well as in the browser, and (2) the diagonal-block test board was corrected (the original had O already on the diagonal, blocking X's threat preemptively).
No defects found in the final bundle.
